title: update

goal.text: Refresh the published claw-kit CLI and installed OpenCode plugin surfaces.

requirements.summary: Refresh the global CLI and OpenCode plugin installation from the maintained source, then verify every installed surface and report exact status.
acceptanceCriteria: The global `@veewo/claw` CLI and OpenCode plugin surfaces are both refreshed.
The plugin payload, discovery skill copies, agent definitions, shim, and workflow guidance match the target version.
OpenCode is restarted before the loaded plugin version is validated.
The result reports exact success or failure for each surface.

tasks.title: Confirm the published target and maintained OpenCode source
tasks.detail: Tell the user a newer claw-kit version was detected. Confirm the target is published and that the maintained claw-kit source used for the OpenCode deployment is at that version before changing local installs. A release workflow must publish and verify first.

tasks.title: Refresh the CLI and OpenCode plugin installation
tasks.detail: Inside the claw-kit repository run `npm run install:opencode-plugin`. The maintained installer builds core and CLI, reinstalls the global CLI, deploys the plugin payload and shim, copies skills to OpenCode discovery, and installs agent definitions. Do not replace this with manual edits to `~/.config/opencode` or treat a CLI-only refresh as complete.

default.summary: The maintained OpenCode installer completed; verify the CLI and all OpenCode surfaces.
nextsteps: Verify the OpenCode payload, discovery copies, shim, agents, guidance, and restart boundary.

tasks.title: Verify the CLI and OpenCode plugin surfaces
tasks.detail: Run `claw --version` and `npm list -g @veewo/claw --depth=0`. Verify `~/.config/opencode/plugins/claw-kit/package.json`, the plugin entry, `~/.config/opencode/plugins/claw-kit.ts`, discovered skills including update and using-claw-kit, installed claw-knowledge-writer agent definitions, references, and workflow-guidance.opencode.json. Confirm retired truth-writer and adr-writer discovery directories are absent. Restart OpenCode, then validate the loaded plugin version and report exact success or failure for both CLI and plugin surfaces.

references.why: Preserves the direct OpenCode update workflow when the claw template cannot run.
Maps OpenCode update requirements to this skill package.

rules: Do not route or ask about another host; this is the OpenCode update workflow.
Publish and verify the target version before release-time installation refresh.
Use the maintained OpenCode installer instead of editing installed copies.
Do not claim success unless both CLI and OpenCode plugin verification pass.
